narration: What if deep-sea diving could make you feel drunk?

narration: This phenomenon is called nitrogen narcosis — a potential risk for divers.
visual_description: Context visual: This phenomenon is called nitrogen narcosis — a potential risk for divers.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: This phenomenon is called nitrogen narcosis — a potential risk for divers.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: This phenomenon is called nitrogen narcosis — a potential risk for divers.

narration: As divers descend, pressure increases. More nitrogen enters the bloodstream. Things get... hazy.
visual_description: Escalation visual: As divers descend, pressure increases. More nitrogen enters the bloodstream. Things get... hazy.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: As divers descend, pressure increases. More nitrogen enters the bloodstream. Things get... hazy.

narration: Symptoms range from euphoria to impaired judgment. Some even report hallucinations.
